title: crotalaria berteroana
intro: Crotalaria berteroana, also known as the Bertero's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Hawaiian Islands and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which may provide relief from various health issues, such as digestive problems and skin infections. Crotalaria berteroana can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its health benefits.
